On the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of '''Rivvidu''', [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] once chased a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Iotran/Legends|Iotran]] mark. After the capture, Fett acquired his ''[[Silver Speeder]]''. Its [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] employed a [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]].
